0:
The Adventurers' Guild investigator is eyeing the festive displays with a healthy dose of suspicion.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

The Adventurers' Guild investigator is eyeing the festive displays with a healthy dose of suspicion.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
While the saints of Eorzea sleep off their night of revelry, the wicked come out to play. All Saints' Wake is once again come to Gridania, and the Adventurers' Guild has sent a lone investigator to ensure that ghastly ghouls do not overrun the city as in ages past. While all appears civil for now, the investigator is certain that the pumpkin-headed apparition is brewing a devious plot and recruits you to approach her under the guise of cooperation. After winning her confidence, you are to put an end to any schemes you uncover.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

4:
Papa Gruff asks you to accompany him on a tour of the All Saints' Wake festivities near both the Leatherworkers' Guild and Lancers' Guild, during which you will instruct him on what form the decorative pumpkins should take. Your guiding words are “Frighten enough to tickle, but not scar.”

※You must be accompanied by Papa Gruff to complete this task. Speak with him again should you become separated.
